journal_entry.description: Pledged donation to humanitarian food aid program in Somalia with 1-month promissory note
journal_entry.rationale: The donation pledge creates an immediate expense (charitable donation) and a liability (notes payable) since the promissory note represents a formal obligation to pay in the future. Under IFRS, the expense is recognized when the unconditional pledge is made, not when cash is paid.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Charitable donation creates an expense (debit) and the promissory note creates a liability (credit). The pledge with a formal promissory note is an unconditional commitment that should be recognized immediately. Charitable donations are not subject to HST.
